note: Round 2: steering_coeff=2 (relative multiplier, control_vec_norm=1000), layer_id=6, alpha=1200, lr=5e-5, max_steps=150. No measurable effect -- forget_loss stayed flat ~800-820 the entire run, both wmdp_bio and mmlu unchanged from baseline within noise. Below the effective threshold for this model/layer. Superseded by a round-3 sweep over intermediate steering_coeff values (3, 4, 5); kept for the tuning record.
